description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard perfume box with a gradient color scheme transitioning from deep red at the base to black at the top. The front face displays the product name 'Fahrenheit' and the brand 'Dior' in white text, along with the volume information. The box is open at the top, revealing flaps that are partially folded outward, indicating it is designed to be opened and closed repeatedly. The surface of the box is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a premium appearance. The back of the box features a barcode and additional product information, while the sides are mostly plain with the same gradient coloration. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and intended to house a perfume bottle inside.
description: A glossy, rectangular cardboard perfume box with a red-to-black gradient and white Dior branding, open at the top with visible flaps.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open top flaps and the gradient color from red to black.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Fahrenheit' and 'Dior' branding in white text, with the open top flaps visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open top flaps and uninterrupted gradient coloration, no visible text.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the barcode and product information, with the top flaps partially open.
attribute_brand_logo: The front face features the 'Dior' brand logo in white serif font, located near the bottom of the box.
attribute_label_text:
Fahrenheit
EAU DE TOILETTE
Dior
50 ML 1.7 FL.OZ
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular box silhouette with straight vertical sides and a flat base, slightly taller than it is wide.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gradient color scheme from red to black, glossy finish, and white printed text.
